calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Petitioner Evelyn Roxana Calderon-Enriquez was sworn and examined. Court grants decree changing name to Evelyn Roxana Henriquez-Calderon. Decree signed in open court.
